name: IOUpay Limited
summary: IOUpay Limited provides fintech and digital commerce software and services that enable its institutional customers to securely authenticate end-user customers and process banking, purchase, and payment transactions in Australia, Malaysia, Indonesia, and internationally. The company offers digital banking platform, which provides ready-to-use application services and digital banking basic architecture to facilitate the development of financial services applications; mobile wallet solution; secure transaction messaging; and mobile backend as a service, a platform that designed for building and enhancing multiplatform enterprise-grade apps. Its Digital Payments division offers telco-based payments infrastructure, which enables a customer to put their content and services on a digital platform. The company also offers digital services, which include platforms and integrated services that help to monetize digital content; IOU Pay platform software to originate, qualify and/or credit score, and onboard new customers directly through digital and social media, and indirectly through collaborating with large customer communities; and mobile OTT (over-the-top) services. It serves banks, utilities, and insurance and telecommunication companies. The company was formerly known as iSentric Limited and changed its name to IOUpay Limited in October 2020. IOUpay Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Sydney, Australia.
